title: Metabolomics for the early detection of cisplatin-induced nephrotoxicity.
author: Ezaki T Nishiumi S Azuma T Yoshida M
content: S-EPMC6062266 PMC6062266 Metabolomics for the early detection of cisplatin-induced nephrotoxicity. Cisplatin, which is an inorganic molecule containing a platinum ion, is an antineoplastic agent that has been used to treat various solid tumors. However, its side effects include nephrotoxicity
